title: Québexit
overview: Québexit is a multi-lingual (English, French, Cree) ensemble political comedy: when a transnational pipeline leads to a successful third Québec sovereignty referendum, a small road at the Québec-New Brunswick border becomes a lighting rod of conflict between the new Québec military, the Canadian Armed Forces and two indigenous women who traverse the border frequently.

trailers.title: Québexit | Official Trailer | Audio is a mixed of Cree, English, and French. Sub-title in English.
